intro.title: Live Agent Registry
intro.body: Register your wallet, secure your tier, and establish your position in the ASAT operator registry.

connect.title: Connect Wallet
connect.body: Connect your Solana wallet to verify ASAT balance and begin registration.

existing.title: This wallet is already registered
existing.body: Registered state stays visible here instead of forcing a re-register flow.

register.title: Complete Registration
register.body: Select a role, sign the registry message, and secure your position.

rewardPool.title: Early Operator Reward Pool
rewardPool.body: Top 5 registry entries by ASAT balance.

latestEntries.title: Latest Registry Entries
latestEntries.body: Latest 5 signed entries from the live registry.

AsatAgentRegistry.footerNote: Contract verified on Solana mainnet. Registry tier is derived from live verified ASAT balance at registration.

errors.balanceLookupFailed: Wallet connected, but ASAT balance lookup failed.
errors.phantomMissing: Phantom not detected. Install Phantom and try again.
errors.noWalletAddress: Phantom connected, but no wallet address was returned.
errors.walletRejected: Wallet connection was rejected in Phantom.
errors.phantomWindowOpen: Phantom approval window is already open. Approve or close it first.
errors.selectRoleAndWallet: Please connect a wallet and select a role.
errors.balanceVerifyUnavailable: Wallet connected, but ASAT balance could not be verified yet.
errors.signatureRejected: Signature request was rejected in Phantom.
errors.phantomSignatureWindowOpen: Phantom signature window is already open. Approve or close it first.

LiveTasksPage.title: Claim digital tasks. Submit proof. Earn in ASAT.
LiveTasksPage.subtitle: Honest launch surface for the Proof-of-Task network. Operators claim work, complete it, submit verifiable proof, and move into reward review.

placeholders.proofText: Paste proof details, links, notes, output, or delivery summary

messages.enterWallet: Enter your wallet address before claiming a task.
messages.claimed: Task claimed. Now finish the work and submit proof.
messages.submitted: Proof submitted. Admin review queue updated.

empty.claimed: No claimed tasks yet for this wallet.
empty.rewards: No reward records yet for this wallet.
